arts.ttl: Roma vs. Venezia to move on from complications
arts.sum: Roma have won only two of their last five Serie A home games (D1 L2), after winning five of the previous six (L1); however, the Giallorossi have scored in 23 consecutive home matches in the competition, their longest such streak since September 2017 (a run of 34 on that occasion). Roma have found the net in each of their last 19 league matches against Venezia - the Giallorossi have managed to score in 20 or more consecutive Serie A matches against only three opponents in their history in the competition: against Bologna (29 between 2000 and 2018), Hellas Verona (22 between 1989 and 2020) and Lecce (21 between 2000 and 2023).

arts.ttl: Roma manager Juric optimistic ahead of Venezia clash
arts.sum: As Roma prepare to face Venezia in their upcoming Serie A match, manager Ivan Juric expressed confidence in his squad during a pre-match press conference. The Croatian coach reflected on the team’s recent performance against Atletico Bilbao and provided updates on key players. Juric addressed the team’s performance against Atletico Bilbao, noting, “The summary is that we ran more in the second half than in the first, which means it has nothing to do with physical condition. Games change, you can’t dominate teams like that for all ninety minutes.” He emphasized that Roma needs to improve their possession in certain The post Roma manager Juric optimistic ahead of Venezia clash appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Former Roma and Milan forward Jeremy Menez announces retirement
arts.sum: Former French international Jeremy Menez has officially announced his retirement from professional football at the age of 37. The talented attacker, who most recently played for Bari in Italy, revealed his decision in an interview with French outlet Lazone. “I’ve been in professional football for over 20 years and I’m saturated with it all,” Menez stated, explaining his reasons for hanging up his boots. Menez’s career spanned two decades and saw him play for several high-profile clubs across Europe. He made a significant impact in Italian football, wearing the shirts of Roma and AC Milan among others. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Venezia: Match Preview
arts.sum: Roma will look to secure back-to-back Serie A victories for the first time this season when they host newly-promoted Venezia at the Stadio Olimpico on Sunday. After a disappointing start to the campaign that saw club legend Daniele De Rossi dismissed, Roma have shown signs of life under new manager Ivan Juric. The Giallorossi secured their first league win last weekend, dispatching Udinese 3-0 with goals from Artem Dovbyk, Tommaso Baldanzi, and Paulo Dybala. Juric’s side followed that up with a creditable 1-1 draw against Athletic Bilbao in their Europa League opener on Thursday. arts.ttl: Venezia Boss Hails Roma Fans Ahead of Sunday Fixture
arts.sum: Venezia coach Eusebio Di Francesco recalls his time at Roma and hails Roman fans ahead of Sunday's clash at the Stadio Olimpico. The 55-year-old has stuttered at the beginning of his mandate at Stadio Pier Luigi Penso and will look to atone in the capital. arts.ttl: Roma Handed Crucial Injury Boost Ahead of Venezia Clash
arts.sum: Roma suffered a massive injury scare during Thursday's 1-1 Europa League draw against Athletic Bilbao, as Paulo Dybala had to come off at halftime. However, according to Calciomercato, further scans have found no damage, bolstering the club's hopes of having the Argentine superstar fit for the upcoming Serie A clash against Venezia.
